tool.name: Ketos Rotrain
tool.command: mkdir -p model logs && ketos @GLOBAL_ARGS@ rotrain @TRAINING_ARGS@ --format-type '$format_type' --level '$level' #if str($reading_order).strip() --reading-order '$reading_order' #end if #if str($class_mapping_from_ckpt).strip() --class-mapping-from-ckpt '$class_mapping_from_ckpt' #end if @TRAINING_DATA_ARGS@ @GROUND_TRUTH_ARGS@ > training_report.txt 2>&1 && cat training_report.txt && @CAPTURE_TRAINING_OUTPUTS@

param.label: Segmentation checkpoint to read class mapping from

tool.help: Trains a Kraken reading-order model for baseline-level or region-level ordering. The model can be merged into a segmentation model with Ketos Convert or Ketos Roadd.
